data.body: Audit retry on 2026-07-19: mandatory review-plan fetched shared state and reached the Anthropic provider, but individual model passes repeatedly hit transport retries and the workflow produced no verdict after an extended bounded wait. The process was interrupted; no plan-review attestation was issued, the ticket remains open/unclaimed, and no repository quality-tool inspection was performed. Next step: restore reliable provider connectivity and rerun review-plan, or explicitly authorize the audited claim --force path.
